channel.title: Anaheim on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Anaheim on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Carthay Circle
item.description: Carthay Circle is located fairly close to the front of California Adventure. You do need an admission to the park in order to access this restaurant which is basically in the square at the end of the main road from the entrance. This was actually our second time visiting. I remember the first time being fairly underwhelming, so I felt it was wasteful to even spend the time to document it.

item.title: Napa Rose
item.description: Summary In our trip to Disneyland, we made a reservation here a month in advance on a Monday night thinking there will be a lot of people. Surprisingly (or unsurprisingly), there was practically no one in here. The dining room was pretty sparse. The bread selection was great. I loved the sourdough a lot, and how it all came out pretty hot. The grilled diver scallop was good too. Scallop was cooked nicely.
